have h_sub : Submartingale X 𝓕 P := hX1
  have h_rc : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (X · ω) := hX2
  have h_τ_le : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω ≤ k := hτk
  have h_σ_st : IsStoppingTime 𝓕 σ := hσ
  have h_τ_st : IsStoppingTime 𝓕 τ := hτ
  refine le_of_forall_pos_integral_le _ ?_
  intro s hs
  have h_int : Integrable (stoppedValue X τ) P :=
    h_sub.martingale.integrable_stoppedValue_of_discreteApproxSequence' h_rc h_τ_le
      h_τ_st.discreteApproxSequence
  have h_meas : MeasurableSet s := hs
  calc
    ∫ ω in s, stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) ω ∂P
      ≤ ∫ ω in s, stoppedValue X τ ω ∂P := by
        apply setIntegral_mono_ae
        · exact h_sub.aestronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue (τ ⊓ σ)
            (h_τ_st.inf h_σ_st)
        · exact h_sub.aestronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue τ h_τ_st
        · filter_upwards [h_τ_le] with ω hω
          exact stoppedValue_mono (min_le_left _ _) h_sub.adapted
    _ = ∫ ω in s, P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] ω ∂P := by
        rw [setIntegral_condExp h_int (hσ.measurableSpace_le _ hs)]
